title: OFCH Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 140 Graduate & Technician Apprentice Posts
description: The Ordnance Factory Chanda (OFCH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 140 Graduate Apprentice and Technician Apprentice posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Civil Engineering, B. Sc can apply for the OFCH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we ha...
